remarks: This sun-drenched, ranch style condo features a sparkling, resort style pool with river views just steps from your door. Other features include oversized rooms with sliders to deck, ample closets, reserved parking #10, low HOA and additional storage. Updated appliances, new Tub surround, Bosch W/D in unit, freshly painted and professionally cleaned. Bring your design expertise to make this condo your forever home. Conveniently located within walking distance to nearby shopping center, park, hospital, golf course, minutes to Metro, restaurants and downtown nightlife. This well-maintained complex is located on a quiet tree lined street with mature trees and perennial gardens.
